title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
author: openai-blog
raw_description: See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.
summary: 澳大利亚支付公司AP+使用ChatGPT Enterprise和Codex加速支付复杂性处理，节省时间、提升质量，并保持人类判断的核心地位。
analysis_note: 案例分享，技术深度一般，但展示了LLM在企业场景的实际价值，相关性中等。
